name: Goal
description: Describes a goal or objective the system should achieve, with an optional rationale.

system.name: System
system.hint: What is the system called? e.g. application, platform, service

goal.name: Goal
goal.hint: What should the system achieve? e.g. support at least 10,000 concurrent users

rationale.name: Rationale
rationale.hint: Why is this goal important? e.g. the system is expected to grow significantly after launch

with-rationale.name: With rationale
with-rationale.description: A goal with an explanation of why it matters.
with-rationale.example: The application shall support at least 10,000 concurrent users, because the system is expected to grow significantly after launch.

without-rationale.name: Without rationale
without-rationale.description: A goal stated without an explicit rationale.
without-rationale.example: The platform shall provide a single sign-on experience.
